visual_description: The audio opens with a slow, melancholic instrumental piece, creating a somber and slightly tense atmosphere. A man in a dark suit is shown getting out of the driver's side of a black car at night. The car is parked in a dimly lit area, with tall grass in the foreground and out-of-focus city lights twinkling in the distant background. A red-lit structure is visible behind the car. The man, with his back partially to the camera, closes the car door. The camera remains stationary, capturing the scene from a medium shot. In the top right corner, a watermark with the Chinese characters "风行网" is visible. The music is subtle and atmospheric, with a gentle, flowing melody that evokes a sense of quiet contemplation or suspense. The scene cuts to an interior shot of a dimly lit room with wood-paneled walls. A woman with dark hair, wearing a brown jacket, stands in profile, talking on a white corded telephone. She holds the receiver to her ear with one hand and gestures with the other. On the wall behind her, there are two circular, porthole-like fixtures and a poster.
